name: Anacle Systems Limited
summary: Anacle Systems Limited engages in the software development, and provision of enterprise application software and energy management solutions in Singapore, Malaysia, the People's Republic of China, and internationally. It operates through three segments: Simplicity and myBill; Starlight; and SpaceMonster. The Simplicity and myBill segment include a package of enterprise application software solutions, which provides specific solutions for enterprise asset management, shared resources management, tenancy management, financial management, supply chain management, customer relationship management, and billing management. The Starlight segment provides cloud-based energy management solutions to the energy profiles of buildings, including energy consumption, power quality, energy analytics, and carbon footprint profiles information. The SpaceMonster segment operates as an online venue booking platform. The company also offers support and maintenance services; and researches, designs, develops, and supervises the manufacturing and assembly process of hardware products. It serves aerospace, defense, education, environment, healthcare, real estate, and utility industries. Anacle Systems Limited was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Singapore.
